description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty hammer with a robust, rectangular head featuring metallic surfaces and reinforced edges. The head is adorned with metallic studs or spikes along the sides, and it has a dark, weathered finish with gold or brass trim, giving it an industrial or possibly fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and wrapped in a textured, reddish-brown grip, likely for enhanced handling and comfort. There are visible mechanical or electrical components, such as wires and metallic fittings, attached to the head and upper handle, suggesting a specialized or powered function. The bottom of the handle is capped with a pointed, metallic end, further reinforcing its heavy-duty design. The overall construction appears solid and built for high-impact use, suitable for demolition or as a prop in a themed urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, industrial-style hammer with a reinforced, spiked head and a textured, reddish-brown handle featuring metallic and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, rectangular hammer head with metallic trim, visible wires, and the full length of the textured handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow profile of the head, the row of spikes along the side, and the pointed metallic end of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view is similar to the front, showing the back face of the head, mechanical details, and the handle's grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the spiked side profile and the handle's length, with less visibility of the mechanical components.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a textured, reddish-brown rubberized grip and metallic fittings; appears ergonomic and designed for secure handling.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with metallic spikes along the sides, reinforced edges, and a flat striking face; features mechanical and electrical components attached.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Visible wires and mechanical fittings attached to the head and upper handle; no other accessories visible.
